message:
refactor(build-coord): evaluate rch status per-segment in cargo detection

Replace cargo_payload_tokens() with cargo_subcommand_for_segment() that
returns both the subcommand name and its rch-wrapped status per segment.
This fixes requires_rch_offload() missing unprotected segments in
multi-command pipelines like "cargo test && rch exec -- true". Add
skip_env_prefixes() to handle env flags (-u, -C, -S) that broke
cargo command recognition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
